title: rubus × thuillieri
intro: Rubus × thuillieri, also known as the hybrid raspberry or François' raspberry, is a hybrid plant species in the family Rosaceae, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × thuillieri include its potential to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and certain types of cancer, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Rubus × thuillieri, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide a natural remedy for various health issues.
